## Frequently asked questions (FAQs)

Programming tests for skills assessment enables swift and seamless technical hiring using a combination of knowledge and application-based techniques such as MCQs and simulators to measure job-relevant skills.

An online coding skills test is conducted on an online coding test platform that enables and esnures swift and seamless technical hiring, with numerous advantages. Core technical tests such as online programming java test can also be taken on an online coding platform.
